title: Anyone else get a defective Eva Evo 04
display_title: Anyone else get a defective Eva Evo 04
wikitext:
[]: Anyone else get a defective Eva Evo 04?             Quote Post by Archaiel » Mon Feb 27, 2012 1:28 pm So I got the Revo Eva Evo 04 only to find it had 2 left shoulder pylons.... I made this topic in the hopes that someone else received a defective figure with perhaps 2 right pylons. It's a long shot I know, but if someone did in fact get one like that both of our problems can be solved. If anyone knows someone in this situation I would appreciate some assistance in contacting them and just to be safe send me a PM as well as post here. Thank you. LONG LIVE EVA \m/(>.<)\m/

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Mar 03, 2012 3:39 pm Shouldn't you need someone with 2 left pylons? Then you could trade... I don't wanna be rude, but you should really start to let go... Rarely will a mistake like that be fixable...

Article: Anyone else get a defective Eva Evo 04
[]: Anyone else get a defective Eva Evo 04?             Quote Post by Archaiel » Mon Feb 27, 2012 1:28 pm So I got the Revo Eva Evo 04 only to find it had 2 left shoulder pylons.... I made this topic in the hopes that someone else received a defective figure with perhaps 2 right pylons. It's a long shot I know, but if someone did in fact get one like that both of our problems can be solved. If anyone knows someone in this situation I would appreciate some assistance in contacting them and just to be safe send me a PM as well as post here. Thank you. LONG LIVE EVA \m/(>.<)\m/
